---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem it Solves
What problem or limitation does this address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work.

## Business Type
- [ ] All businesses
- [ ] Dairy only
- [ ] General Store only
- [ ] Construction only

## Additional Context
Mockups, examples, or any other context.
